criteria_verification.criterion_text: EventEmitter injected into AutoBuildOrchestrator via constructor
criteria_verification.evidence: Added optional 'emitter' parameter to AutoBuildOrchestrator.__init__() with NullEmitter as default. Stored as self._emitter. Tests TestAutoBuildOrchestratorEmitterInjection verify injection and default behavior.
criteria_verification.notes: Added optional 'emitter' parameter to AutoBuildOrchestrator.__init__() with NullEmitter as default. Stored as self._emitter. Tests TestAutoBuildOrchestratorEmitterInjection verify injection and default behavior.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: task.started emitted at orchestration begin with attempt field
criteria_verification.evidence: Added _emit_task_started() helper called at the start of orchestrate(). Emits TaskStartedEvent with attempt=1, task_id, agent_role='player', and ISO 8601 timestamp. Tests TestTaskStartedEvent verify emission and attempt field.
criteria_verification.notes: Added _emit_task_started() helper called at the start of orchestrate(). Emits TaskStartedEvent with attempt=1, task_id, agent_role='player', and ISO 8601 timestamp. Tests TestTaskStartedEvent verify emission and attempt field.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: task.completed emitted on success with turn_count, diff_stats, verification_status
criteria_verification.evidence: Added _emit_task_completed() helper called when final_decision=='approved'. Emits TaskCompletedEvent with turn_count=len(turn_history), diff_stats summary, verification_status from last turn decision, and prompt_profile. Tests TestTaskCompletedEvent verify emission with all required fields.
criteria_verification.notes: Added _emit_task_completed() helper called when final_decision=='approved'. Emits TaskCompletedEvent with turn_count=len(turn_history), diff_stats summary, verification_status from last turn decision, and prompt_profile. Tests TestTaskCompletedEvent verify emission with all required fields.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: task.failed emitted on failure with valid failure_category
criteria_verification.evidence: Added FAILURE_CATEGORY_MAP dict mapping all final_decision values to FailureCategory controlled vocabulary. Added _emit_task_failed() helper called on all failure paths (loop failures, pre_loop_blocked, RateLimitExceededError). Parametrized tests verify all 7 failure mappings plus rate_limit category.
criteria_verification.notes: Added FAILURE_CATEGORY_MAP dict mapping all final_decision values to FailureCategory controlled vocabulary. Added _emit_task_failed() helper called on all failure paths (loop failures, pre_loop_blocked, RateLimitExceededError). Parametrized tests verify all 7 failure mappings plus rate_limit category.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: wave.completed emitted after each wave with independent wave_id
criteria_verification.evidence: Added _emit_wave_completed() async helper to FeatureOrchestrator. Called in _execute_wave() after parallel results are collected. Each wave gets wave_id='wave-{wave_number}' ensuring distinct IDs. Tests TestWaveCompletedEvent verify emission and distinct wave_ids across 3 waves.
criteria_verification.notes: Added _emit_wave_completed() async helper to FeatureOrchestrator. Called in _execute_wave() after parallel results are collected. Each wave gets wave_id='wave-{wave_number}' ensuring distinct IDs. Tests TestWaveCompletedEvent verify emission and distinct wave_ids across 3 waves.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: rate_limit_count of 0 reported for waves with no rate limits
criteria_verification.evidence: The _emit_wave_completed() helper accepts rate_limit_count parameter, currently hardcoded to 0 in _execute_wave() since rate limit tracking per-wave is not yet available. Tests TestWaveRateLimitCount verify rate_limit_count=0 in emitted event.
criteria_verification.notes: The _emit_wave_completed() helper accepts rate_limit_count parameter, currently hardcoded to 0 in _execute_wave() since rate limit tracking per-wave is not yet available. Tests TestWaveRateLimitCount verify rate_limit_count=0 in emitted event.

criteria_verification.evidence: Added asyncio.run(self._emitter.flush()) call in _finalize_phase() before thread cleanup, wrapped in try/except for resilience. Test TestEmitterFlush.test_flush_called_in_finalize verifies flush is called during finalize.
criteria_verification.notes: Added asyncio.run(self._emitter.flush()) call in _finalize_phase() before thread cleanup, wrapped in try/except for resilience. Test TestEmitterFlush.test_flush_called_in_finalize verifies flush is called during finalize.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: NullEmitter used as default when no emitter provided
criteria_verification.evidence: Both AutoBuildOrchestrator and FeatureOrchestrator use 'emitter if emitter is not None else NullEmitter()' as default. Tests TestNullEmitterDefault and TestFeatureOrchestratorEmitterInjection verify default behavior.
criteria_verification.notes: Both AutoBuildOrchestrator and FeatureOrchestrator use 'emitter if emitter is not None else NullEmitter()' as default. Tests TestNullEmitterDefault and TestFeatureOrchestratorEmitterInjection verify default behavior.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Unit tests verify all lifecycle events and failure categories
criteria_verification.evidence: 25 unit tests cover: seam contract, emitter injection (both orchestrators), task.started, task.completed, task.failed with all 7 failure categories + rate_limit, wave.completed with distinct IDs, rate_limit_count=0, flush in finalize, NullEmitter default, and FAILURE_CATEGORY_MAP validation against FailureCategory Literal type.
criteria_verification.notes: 25 unit tests cover: seam contract, emitter injection (both orchestrators), task.started, task.completed, task.failed with all 7 failure categories + rate_limit, wave.completed with distinct IDs, rate_limit_count=0, flush in finalize, NullEmitter default, and FAILURE_CATEGORY_MAP validation against FailureCategory Literal type.
